gameDetails.title: Game details
gameDetails.unselected: Pick a mini-game above to see scoring hints.

descriptions.noTricks: Avoid taking any tricks—each one costs you points.
descriptions.noHearts: Steer clear of hearts. Every heart captured adds penalty points.
descriptions.noKingsJacks: Keep Kings and Jacks out of your pile to dodge the penalties.
descriptions.noQueens: Every captured Queen hurts, so try to dump them early.
descriptions.noKingHearts: Protect yourself from the King of Hearts—whoever gets it pays dearly.
descriptions.not7thLast: Don't win the 7th or last trick. Give them to someone else.
descriptions.winTricks: {player} chooses trump. Win tricks to bank the bonus.
